name: sat-llamadas-app
description: Aplicación de escritorio para registrar llamadas del SAT
author: SAT

scripts.dev: cross-env SAT_BACKEND_PORT=5001 concurrently "cd backend && python app.py" "electron ."
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/free-port-dev.ps1 && npm run dev
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && "C:\Users\RIKUDEV\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\python.exe" -m PyInstaller --onefile --name backend --distpath dist --noconfirm app.py
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron && npm run build:copy-backend
